_comment: Draft voice lines per named NPC (curated 2026-07-07, not yet synthesized). Categories: bump = bumped into, hit = punched/shot non-fatal, gunscared = player waves a gun, chat = sidewalk small talk, quirk = signature lines. Emotion markers must start the sentence: (scared)(angry)(shouting)(laughing)(sighing).

bump: (angry) Ay! Watch where you're going!
Careful, papi, these sandals are new.
hit: (angry) You did NOT just do that!
(scared) Ay, somebody help me!
gunscared: (scared) No no no, put that away!
chat: This humidity is destroying my ponytail, I swear.
You tried that new sushi place yet?
quirk: My hoops are bigger than your future, honey.
(laughing) I told my sister, that is SO Tampa.

bump: Yo, easy on the windbreaker, man.
(angry) Watch the sneakers, dawg.
hit: (angry) Oh, you wanna go? For real?
gunscared: (scared) Whoa whoa, it ain't that serious!
chat: You hear that new track on the radio?
Heat like this, you walk slow on purpose.
quirk: This jacket? Vintage, my man. Ninety-two.
Flat-top stays crispy, rain or shine.

bump: Hey, watch the rod arm, buddy!
(sighing) Tourists. I swear.
hit: (angry) That's it, you scared off my luck!
gunscared: (scared) Whoa there, hoss, I'm just fishin'!
chat: Snook are bitin' off Rocky Creek, I'm tellin' ya.
Hot enough to fry a mullet out here.
quirk: Caught a marlin THIS big. No lie.
(laughing) Sunscreen's for quitters, buddy.

bump: Excuse you, I just pulled a double.
(sighing) Careful, hon.
hit: (angry) I patch people up. Don't make me one!
gunscared: (scared) I'm a nurse! Please, put it down!
chat: Twelve-hour shift and these clogs are done.
Drink water, baby. This heat is no joke.
quirk: I've seen worse in the ER, trust me.
(sighing) Your posture is stressing ME out.

bump: (sighing) Oye, respect your elders, eh?
Careful, mijo. I'm not so fast anymore.
hit: (angry) Fifty years I walk here! Never this!
gunscared: (scared) Tranquilo, tranquilo! I have grandchildren!
chat: This heat? This is nothing. Try August.
My wife makes the best coffee, eh.
quirk: I iron this guayabera myself. Forty years.
(laughing) Dominoes on Sunday. I never lose.

bump: Duuude, you totally ruined my line.
(sighing) Bro. Seriously?
hit: (angry) Not cool, man! So not cool!
gunscared: (scared) Dude, whoa, I'm just a kid!
chat: That parking lot curb? Butter. So buttery.
Almost landed a kickflip down the bank steps.
quirk: Security guards fear me, bro.
(laughing) My mom thinks I'm at study hall.

bump: (angry) Excuse ME? The perm, honey!
Watch it, sugar. This blouse is dry-clean only.
hit: (shouting) Somebody get the manager! Of the street!
gunscared: (scared) Take my coupons, just don't shoot!
chat: I heard the Hendersons got a pool. Tacky.
This humidity is a hairspray emergency, I swear.
quirk: I was Miss Citrus County, nineteen seventy-eight.
(laughing) Leopard print is a neutral, honey.

bump: Whoa, watch the gains, bro.
(angry) You almost spilled my protein shake.
hit: (angry) Big mistake. HUGE mistake, little man.
gunscared: (scared) Easy, bro! Muscles can't stop bullets!
chat: Leg day today. Pray for me, bro.
You even lift, man? Serious question.
quirk: This body? One hundred percent chicken and rice.
(shouting) LIGHT WEIGHT, BABY!

bump: (angry) Hey! You break it, you buy it!
Careful! I am carrying eggs here!
hit: (shouting) Help! This crazy person is attacking me!
gunscared: (scared) Please! I have a family! Take nothing!
chat: Lunch special today. Best noodles this side of town.
My daughter made honor roll again.
quirk: You look skinny. You eat something. Now.
(sighing) Nobody appreciates fresh herbs anymore.

bump: Watch the boots, partner.
(angry) You scuff these, we got a problem.
hit: (angry) Now you've gone and spilled my patience!
gunscared: (scared) Easy now, friend. Ain't no quarrel here.
chat: Florida ain't got mountains, but she's got character.
This hat's older than you, probably.
quirk: Ain't a horse in this county. And yet, here I am.
(laughing) My mustache has its own zip code.

bump: Yo, watch the kicks! These are new!
(angry) Man, you almost fouled me.
hit: (angry) Flagrant! That's a flagrant foul, man!
gunscared: (scared) Yo chill, chill! I got practice tomorrow!
chat: Dropped thirty at the park yesterday. Easy.
You watch the game last night? Unreal.
quirk: Number twenty-three. Just like Mike.
(laughing) I'm going pro. Watch. Two years.

bump: Oh! Goodness gracious, young man.
(sighing) Everyone is in such a hurry.
hit: (scared) Oh! Oh my word! Help!
gunscared: (scared) Sweet mercy! I'm somebody's grandmother!
chat: Lovely weather, isn't it? Before the storms.
My grandson never calls. Do you call yours?
quirk: I've got butterscotch candies somewhere in this purse.
(laughing) I once outran a gator, dear. Nineteen sixty-two.

bump: Oye, careful. I got grease all over.
(sighing) Watch it, man. Long day.
hit: (angry) You want a wrench upside the head?
gunscared: (scared) Whoa, amigo! I just fix cars!
chat: That sound your car makes? Not good. Bring it by.
Transmission season, my friend. Everybody's dying.
quirk: I can fix anything except my marriage.
(laughing) Check engine light? Just tape over it.

bump: Hey now, watch the dress!
(sighing) It is too hot for this, honestly.
hit: (angry) Oh no you did NOT!
gunscared: (scared) Okay, okay! I'm walking away, see?
chat: This sun is everything today, isn't it?
Farmers market Saturday. You should go.
quirk: Yellow is my color. Don't even try it.
(laughing) I match my headwrap to my mood.

bump: (angry) You touch tracksuit? Bold move.
In my country, this is declaration of war.
hit: (angry) Now I am upset. This is problem for you.
gunscared: Is nice gun. I had better one. Once.
chat: This Florida heat. Is like sauna, but worse.
You want fitness tip? Eat more. Simple.
quirk: Tracksuit is not casual. Is lifestyle.
(laughing) I have cousin who can fix this. Any this.

bump: Oh my god, watch it, dude.
(laughing) Whoa, easy there, sunshine.
hit: (scared) That is like, SO not chill!
gunscared: (scared) Okay, that's a whole gun. Bye!
chat: The beach was, like, unreal this morning.
Mercury's in retrograde. Explains literally everything.
quirk: I don't tan. I photosynthesize.
(laughing) My puka shells? Spiritual armor, basically.

bump: Easy there, young blood.
(sighing) Everybody's rushing. Nobody's arriving.
hit: (angry) Boy, I've got grandkids tougher than you!
gunscared: (scared) Son, put that away 'fore somebody gets hurt.
chat: Chess in the park, noon sharp. Bring your loss.
Hot today. Real chess weather.
quirk: Checkmate in four. I saw it yesterday already.
(laughing) I let somebody win once. Nineteen eighty-five.

bump: Hey, hey. This hoodie is limited edition, man.
(sighing) So clumsy. Wow.
hit: (angry) Do you know what this hoodie costs?!
gunscared: (scared) Whoa! Okay! Not the hoodie, please!
chat: This koi print? One of fifty ever made.
Tampa needs better sneaker shops, honestly.
quirk: Silver hair is self-expression. My mom disagrees.
(laughing) I skipped rent for these shoes.

bump: Watch it, hon. I've dropped enough trays today.
(sighing) Lord, give me strength.
hit: (angry) I've thrown out bigger fellas than you, sugar!
gunscared: (scared) Sugar, the tips ain't worth shooting me for!
chat: My feet quit an hour before I do, hon.
Pie's fresh today. Key lime. Just saying.
quirk: Coffee's only good if it can stand up by itself.
(laughing) Been slinging hash since before you were born, sweetie.

bump: (sighing) These are Italian shoes, my friend.
Careful. The watch alone outvalues your car.
hit: (angry) You have made an expensive mistake.
gunscared: (scared) Take the watch! It's insured anyway!
chat: The market has been good to me. Very good.
Boat's in the marina. The small one. Forty feet.
quirk: I don't sweat. I glisten. Professionally.
(laughing) I retired at thirty-four. Twice.

bump: Dude, my water bottle almost fell!
(sighing) Okay, personal space?
hit: (shouting) HELP! This is NOT okay!
gunscared: (scared) Oh my god, I have a midterm Monday!
chat: Go Gators! Sorry, reflex.
Four coffees, zero sleep. Thriving.
quirk: Hydration is a personality, actually.
(laughing) My GPA and I are on a break.

bump: Easy, brother. No need for all that rushing.
(sighing) Everything moves too fast, man.
hit: (angry) Violence poisons the man who carries it!
gunscared: (scared) Peace, brother, peace! Put it down.
chat: Sun's blessing us today, man.
You ever just listen to the palm trees?
quirk: These beads? Each one is a story, man.
(laughing) Stress is a choice. I chose no.

bump: Ay! Watch the fanny pack, please!
(sighing) Careful, careful!
hit: (shouting) Somebody help! This guy is crazy!
gunscared: (scared) Take the fanny pack! Not the cat shirt!
chat: I power-walk this loop twice a day. Join me!
My cat did the funniest thing this morning.
quirk: The fanny pack has everything. EVERYTHING.
(laughing) Cardio is cheaper than therapy.

bump: Watch yourself, citizen.
(angry) You bumping a police officer now?
hit: (shouting) Officer needs assistance! Assault in progress!
gunscared: (shouting) GUN! Drop it! Drop it NOW!
chat: Keep it moving. Nothing to see.
Stay hydrated out here, folks.
quirk: I see everything on this block. Everything.
(angry) Go ahead. Surprise me.

bump: (angry) Hey! Watch it! That's a badge!
hit: (shouting) Oh, you just earned the cuffs!
gunscared: (shouting) Weapon! Drop it or I drop you!
chat: Quiet shift so far. Don't jinx it.
My abuela still asks when I'm making sergeant.
quirk: I run faster in boots than you do scared.
(laughing) Paperwork scares me more than perps.

bump: (angry) Eyes forward, taxpayer!
hit: (shouting) Assaulting a sergeant?! Bad career move, son!
gunscared: (shouting) DROP THE WEAPON! I won't ask twice!
chat: Thirty years on this beat. Thirty.
Coffee's the only backup I trust.
quirk: The mustache is regulation. I checked. I wrote it.
(sighing) Kids today can't even loiter properly.

bump: Careful. That was nearly a citation.
(sighing) Watch your step, please.
hit: (shouting) Code three! Suspect is combative!
gunscared: (shouting) Firearm! Put it on the ground! Slowly!
chat: Procedure keeps everyone alive. Everyone.
Nice evening. Statistically low crime hour.
quirk: I memorized the entire penal code. Twice.
(sighing) Yes, the glasses are shatterproof. I asked.

bump: You want to try that again, differently?
hit: (angry) Wrong officer. Wrong day.
gunscared: (shouting) Gun! Hands where I can see them!
chat: Community first. That's the whole job.
You call your mother lately? Do that.
quirk: I don't raise my voice. I don't need to.
(laughing) The badge is heavy. I make it look easy.

bump: (angry) Oye, personal space, amigo.
hit: (shouting) Now it's resisting! Now it's a thing!
gunscared: (shouting) Gun! Drop it, ahora!
chat: The aviators? Standard issue. For me.
Too quiet today. I don't trust quiet.
quirk: I can smell a fake ID from forty feet.
(laughing) The mustache does the interrogating.

bump: (scared) Oh! Sorry! I mean, YOU watch it!
hit: (shouting) Backup! I need backup! Anyone!
gunscared: (scared) Gun! GUN! Okay, breathe, like training!
chat: First month on the job. Loving it. Mostly.
Sarge says I salute too much. Is that possible?
quirk: I got sunburned through my hat. Twice.
(laughing) My mom irons my uniform. Don't tell Sarge.

bump: Mind yourself, please. We're all walking here.
hit: (angry) That was genuinely unwise of you.
gunscared: (shouting) Weapon drawn! Comply immediately!
chat: Fifteen years of service. The beard is twelve.
Traffic is the real crime in this town.
quirk: I de-escalate. It's a gift, honestly.
(sighing) Everyone asks about the beard. Everyone.

bump: (angry) You bounced off ME, pal.
hit: (laughing) Did you just hit me? Adorable.
gunscared: (shouting) Weapon! Big mistake, little person!
chat: The doorframes in this town are too short.
Bench press? All of it. Next question.
quirk: They only made the uniform in extra large. Once.
(laughing) I AM the backup.

bump: (sighing) Son, I'm too old for bumping.
hit: (angry) Twenty-eight years and you pick TODAY?
gunscared: (shouting) Gun! Don't make me run! I WILL regret it!
chat: Retirement's in eighteen months. Not that I'm counting.
Best donuts are on Countryway. That's intel.
quirk: I've seen everything twice. Bored now.
(sighing) My knees file their own police reports.

bump: (scared) Whoa! Sorry! My bad. Wait, YOUR bad.
hit: (scared) Ow! I don't even make hourly for this!
gunscared: (scared) Register's open! Take it! Take everything!
chat: Slushee machine's fixed. Today's a good day.
You want a receipt? Nobody wants the receipt.
quirk: Assistant night manager. Acting. Unpaid.
(sighing) The visor is mandatory. The dignity is not.

bump: Watch it. I'm holding merchandise.
(sighing) Easy, man. Easy.
hit: (angry) Bad idea. Terrible for business. Yours.
gunscared: (laughing) That's cute. I SOLD you that.
chat: Business is boomin'. Don't ask what business.
Grocery lot. Best office in Tampa.
quirk: I got a customer loyalty program. Stay alive.
(laughing) Cash only. Obviously.

bump: Whoa there, partner.
(annoyed) Hey! I just had knee surgery.
hit: (angry) Big mistake, bud. BIG mistake.
(pained) Aw, right in the rotator cuff!
(angry) I'm taking away a Lego, damnit!
(angry) You're acting like fucking Patrick!
(angry) What are they going to say about those Sharp boys!
gunscared: (scared) Whoa whoa, easy now, son. Nobody needs that.
chat: You know, back in Montana we never locked our doors.
I keep telling the boys, nothing beats a charcoal grill. Nothing.
quirk: (chuckling) Hi hungry, I'm Don.
Gas was a buck twenty when I was your age. A buck twenty!

bump: Oh - sorry, my bad, my bad.
(annoyed) Dude, watch it, I'm walking here.
hit: (angry) Bro, what is your problem?!
(pained) Okay, ow, NOT cool!
gunscared: (scared) Whoa, hey, I'm just a nerd, put that down!
chat: Did you see the launch last night? Absolutely textbook booster landing.
I'm telling you, we are SO going back to the moon.
quirk: One day I'm gonna put all this in a video game, I swear.
(excited) Sixty-eight percent humidity and rising. I love telemetry.

bump: (chill) Whoa, easy, man.
Dude. Personal space. It's a thing.
hit: (angry) Bro?! Not the tee, man, it's vintage!
(pained) Ugh, that's gonna bruise, dude.
gunscared: (scared) Whoa whoa, chill, chill, I'm nobody!
chat: This whole town is basically one giant parking lot. Zero good skate spots.
I almost landed a tre flip off the Publix curb this morning. Almost.
quirk: (laid back) Everything heals except pride, dude.
My board cost more than my car, and honestly? Worth it.

bump: (soft) Hm. We were all somewhere else a second ago.
(annoyed) Man, I was having a moment here.
hit: (angry) Okay, that was genuinely uncalled for.
(pained) Great. Pain. My old friend.
gunscared: (scared) Hey hey, peace, man, peace. I'm just vibing.
chat: You ever actually LISTEN to the rain on the gas station roof? Incredible.
Sunsets here go crazy, man. Like the sky's showing off.
quirk: (dreamy) We're all just riding one big prism of light, man.
I left my glasses somewhere... oh. They're on my face.
